title: Permission precheck
implementation_summary: Adds the RP00.P02.M03.S05 Hermes Validation Permission precheck surface as deterministic metadata-only control-plane policy, service prechecker, validator, fixture, README, contract definition, and contract validator wiring. The slice consumes S04 allow_metadata_only Matter trace results, requires a carried permission_decision_ref, emits allow_metadata_only permission metadata for Matter-scoped or firm-level control-plane metadata, carries TEN-001 through TEN-008 trace refs, validation context IDs, acceptance gate IDs, M00 refs, permission_decision_ref, and audit_event_ref, rejects unsafe permission/runtime/AuthZ/Hermes/evidence/bypass claims fail-closed, and hands off to RP00.P02.M03.S06 without creating runtime routes, executing service logic, mutating tenant lifecycle state, running Hermes validation, creating Hermes evidence, evaluating runtime permissions, calling AuthZ, running a permission engine, replacing human approval, using real data, or writing product state.
